title: Terms of Use
intro: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the Non Prep Veneer website. By using the site, requesting a smile assessment, or contacting us, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

sections.heading: Informational purpose only
body: All content on this website, including information about non-prep veneers, eligibility guidance, before-and-after cases, and the smile assessment, is provided for general informational purposes only.

This content does not constitute medical or dental advice and is not a substitute for an in-person clinical examination, diagnosis, or treatment by a qualified dental professional. Always seek the advice of a qualified professional before making treatment decisions.

sections.heading: No professional relationship
body: Using this site, submitting a smile assessment, or contacting us does not create a doctor–patient or any other professional relationship. Such a relationship is established only after an in-person consultation and clinical evaluation.
Any guidance provided online is preliminary and subject to confirmation during a clinical exam.

sections.heading: Use of the smile assessment
body: The smile assessment tool offers general, non-binding feedback based on the photo and information you provide. Results are indicative only and do not guarantee candidacy, outcomes, or pricing.
You are responsible for ensuring that any photo or information you submit is your own or that you have the right to share it, and that it does not infringe the rights of any other person.

sections.heading: Results and expectations
body: Cosmetic results vary between individuals and depend on factors that can only be assessed during a clinical exam. Images shown on this site illustrate possible outcomes and are not a promise of the result you will achieve.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
body: You agree to use the site lawfully and not to misuse it. In particular, you must not upload unlawful, harmful, or infringing content, attempt to gain unauthorised access to the site or its systems, interfere with its normal operation, or use it in any way that could damage or impair the service for others.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: All text, images, graphics, logos, and other materials on this site are owned by Non Prep Veneer or its licensors and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, reproduce, modify, or distribute them without our prior written permission.

sections.heading: Third-party links and services
body: The site may link to or rely on third-party services, such as WhatsApp. We are not responsible for the content, terms, or privacy practices of those third parties, and your use of them is at your own discretion and subject to their terms.

sections.heading: Disclaimers
body: The site is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, we make no warranties of any kind regarding the accuracy, completeness, reliability, or availability of the site or its content.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Non Prep Veneer is not liable for any loss or damage arising from your use of, or reliance on, this site or its content.
Nothing in these terms excludes or limits any liability that cannot be excluded or limited under applicable law, including liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence.

sections.heading: Privacy
body: Your use of the site is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we collect and handle your information. Please review it to understand our practices.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
body: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. Changes take effect when posted on this page, and your continued use of the site means you accept the updated terms.

sections.heading: Governing law
body: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of Iraq, and any disputes arising from or relating to the site will be subject to the competent courts of Iraq.

sections.heading: Contact us
body: If you have questions about these Terms of Use, you can contact Non Prep Veneer by phone or WhatsApp at +964 773 070 0085.
